landingSubtitle: years of love, growth, and adventure

timelineEvents.title: First Met
timelineEvents.subtitle: June 15, 2014
timelineEvents.description: It all started with a simple cup of coffee. We talked for hours and realized we had so much in common.

timelineEvents.title: She Said Yes
timelineEvents.subtitle: June 15, 2015
timelineEvents.description: Under a beautiful sunset, I got down on one knee and asked the most important question of my life.

timelineEvents.title: Our Big Day
timelineEvents.subtitle: August 20, 2016
timelineEvents.description: Surrounded by our friends and family, we tied the knot and celebrated our love.

timelineEvents.title: First Trip Together
timelineEvents.subtitle: December 10, 2016
timelineEvents.description: Our first international trip as a married couple. The city of lights was truly magical.

timelineEvents.title: Our New Home
timelineEvents.subtitle: March 15, 2018
timelineEvents.description: We bought our first house! It needed some work, but we made it our own.

timelineEvents.title: 10 Years Later
timelineEvents.subtitle: June 15, 2024
timelineEvents.description: A decade of memories, laughter, and love. Here's to many more years together.
